name: carrefour-qa-automation-framework
description: Final QA Automation Framework - API + Mobile (Aligned with Carrefour Challenge)

scripts.install:all: cd api-tests && npm install && cd ../mobile-tests && npm install
scripts.test:mobile: cd mobile-tests && npx wdio run wdio.conf.js
scripts.test: npm run install:all && npm run test:api && npm run test:mobile
